item.title: JanAageFjortoft: Jan Aage Fjørtoft @JanAageFjortoft · 2min Two! games for me today. First Everton - Liverpool, then after post-match int
item.description:
Jan Aage Fjørtoft @JanAageFjortoft · 2min Two! games for me today. First Everton - Liverpool, then after post-match interviews straight to Manchster City - Arsenal to do the interviews there (watching 1st half in the car).
Tarkowski and Leon Osman interviews before the first derby at Hill Dickinson Stadium Mostrar más 3 460

item.title: SpursOfficial: Tottenham Hotspur @SpursOfficial · 9min Since yesterday’s fixture against Brighton, which took place during the Premier
item.description:
Tottenham Hotspur @SpursOfficial · 9min Since yesterday’s fixture against Brighton, which took place during the Premier League’s No Room For Racism weekend, Kevin Danso has been, and continues to be, subject to significant and abhorrent racist abuse on social media.
There is no place for racism at Tottenham Hotspur. Mostrar más 97 116 462 10 mil
